422-- Price fetch triggered at three integration points: after fetchNews() renders, after fetchTier() confirms Max user, and stopped in showUpgradeGate()
423:- Ticker badges are clickable (`cursor: pointer`, `data-ticker` attribute) — ready for US-012 company profile modal
424-- Column gated to Max tier via existing `requiredFeature: 'ai_ticker_recommendations'` in COLUMN_DEFS
425-- Column width increased from 80px to 160px to accommodate price display
426-- Added CSS: `.ticker-badge` (inline-flex clickable badge), `.ticker-price` with `.price-up`/`.price-down`/`.price-flat` color classes, `.ticker-change` for percentage
427-- **Files changed:** `frontend/src/terminal-app.js`, `frontend/src/styles/terminal.css`
428-- **Self-validation:** Vite build exits 0, mypy clean, pytest 85 passed (8 pre-existing failures in test_tiers.py/test_rate_limit.py)
429-- **Environment notes for Tester:**
430-  - Test assertion 1: `cd frontend && npx vite build` — should exit 0
431-  - For browser testing: `cd frontend && npx vite dev` (port 5173) and `python server.py` (port 8000)
432-  - Must be logged in as a Max-tier user to see the Ticker column (Pro/Free users see it locked in column settings)
433-  - Enable the Ticker column in column settings panel (click sliders icon) — it defaults to hidden
434-  - With Ticker column visible, price badges appear next to ticker symbols (e.g., "AAPL $150.25 +1.18%")
435-  - If the Polygon.io API key is not configured or market is closed, badges show ticker symbol only (no price = no price badge, just the ticker text)
436-  - Prices refresh every 10 seconds — wait 10s and observe prices updating
437-  - Green color = positive change, red = negative change
438:  - Ticker badges are clickable (cursor changes to pointer) but no modal opens yet (US-012)
439-  - If no ticker on a news item, shows em-dash (—)
440-  - 8 pre-existing test failures in test_tiers.py/test_rate_limit.py — NOT related to this story

475-  - Company description (scrollable, max-height 120px)
476-  - Homepage link (opens in new tab)

482-- Added 4 new state fields: `companyProfileOpen`, `companyProfileSymbol`, `companyProfileData`, `companyProfileLoading`

def _shape_item(item, tier):
    """Strip or mask fields that the user's tier doesn't have access to."""
    if not has_feature(tier, "sentiment_filter"):
        item.pop("sentiment_score", None)
        item.pop("sentiment_label", None)
    if not has_feature(tier, "deduplication"):
        item.pop("duplicate", None)
    # Ticker recommendations require ai_ticker_recommendations feature
    if not has_feature(tier, "ai_ticker_recommendations"):
        item.pop("target_asset", None)
        item.pop("asset_type", None)
        item.pop("confidence", None)
        item.pop("risk_level", None)
        item.pop("tradeable", None)
        item.pop("reasoning", None)
    return item
